title: 200 drones intercepted
title_en: 200 drones intercepted
title_uk: Перехоплено 200 безпілотників
description: A massive drone attack on Moscow continues this morning: at least 200 UAVs are flying towards the Russian capital. According to Moscow Mayor Sobyanin, the Russian Air Defense Forces allegedly shot down about 15 drones. Due to the threat of UAVs, the work of Moscow airports was temporarily restricted.
description_en: A massive drone attack on Moscow continues this morning: at least 200 UAVs are flying towards the Russian capital. According to Moscow Mayor Sobyanin, the Russian Air Defense Forces allegedly shot down about 15 drones. Due to the threat of UAVs, the work of Moscow airports was temporarily restricted.
description_uk: С утра продолжается массированная атака дронов на Москву: в сторону столицы рф летят не менее 200 БПЛА По заявлениям мэра Москвы Собянина, российская ПВО якобы сбила около 15 беспилотников. Из-за угрозы БПЛА работу московских аэропортов временно ограничивали.

title: Ukrainian engineers, inventors, researchers and scientists are today...

description: Ukrainian engineers, inventors, researchers and scientists are today the driver of our technological power. It is thanks to your intelligence and daily work that Ukraine finds effective answers to the most difficult challenges. In times of war, technological development, creativity and scientific knowledge become a special advantage. From marine drones, NRC and drones to complex artificial intelligence systems - your developments...
description_en: Ukrainian engineers, inventors, researchers and scientists are today the driver of our technological power. It is thanks to your intelligence and daily work that Ukraine finds effective answers to the most difficult challenges. In times of war, technological development, creativity and scientific knowledge become a special advantage. From marine drones, NRC and drones to complex artificial intelligence systems - your developments...

Саме завдяки вашому розуму та щоденній праці Україна знаходить ефективні відповіді на найскладніші виклики. У час війни технологічний розвиток, креативність та наукове знання стають особливою перевагою. Від морських дронів, НРК та безпілотників до складних систем штучного інтелекту – ваші розробки...

description: Our long-range sanctions for this week. And most of the operations are still in progress, so not all of our results are on the video. There is damage to the Be-200 amphibious aircraft, the Ka-27 rotorcraft, a dry cargo ship with ammunition, the Pantsir-S1 anti-aircraft missile and gun complex, the Tor anti-aircraft missile complex, the Redut-2US communication complex, drones and much more. Also, our long-range sanctions hit...
description_en: Our long-range sanctions for this week. And most of the operations are still in progress, so not all of our results are on the video. There is damage to the Be-200 amphibious aircraft, the Ka-27 rotorcraft, a dry cargo ship with ammunition, the Pantsir-S1 anti-aircraft missile and gun complex, the Tor anti-aircraft missile complex, the Redut-2US communication complex, drones and much more. Also, our long-range sanctions hit...

Є ураження літака-амфібії Бе-200, гвинтокрила Ка-27, корабля-суховантажу з боєприпасами, зенітного ракетно-гарматного комплексу «Панцир-С1», зенітного ракетного комплексу «Тор», комплексу звʼязку «Редут-2УС», дронів і багато іншого. Також наші далекобійні санкції били по...

title: Ukraine holds on thanks to those who, with their courage, dedication...
title_en: Ukraine holds on thanks to those who, with their courage, dedication...
title_uk: Україна тримається завдяки тим, хто своєю мужністю, самовідданістю...
description: Ukraine holds on thanks to those who, with their courage, dedication and strength, provide us with the opportunity to be - to be ourselves, to be Ukraine. For the fifth year, we are facing an enemy who is bigger than us, but who is not getting what he wants. And thanks to our people, thanks to our Ukrainian determination to defend ourselves, we will definitely stop Russia and guarantee the safety of our state and people. Noted...
description_en: Ukraine holds on thanks to those who, with their courage, dedication and strength, provide us with the opportunity to be - to be ourselves, to be Ukraine. For the fifth year, we are facing an enemy who is bigger than us, but who is not getting what he wants. And thanks to our people, thanks to our Ukrainian determination to defend ourselves, we will definitely stop Russia and guarantee the safety of our state and people. Noted...
description_uk: Україна тримається завдяки тим, хто своєю сміливістю, відданістю та силою забезпечують нам можливість бути – бути собою, бути Україною. П’ятий рік ми стоїмо проти ворога, який більше, ніж ми, але який не досягає того, чого хоче. І завдяки нашим людям, завдяки нашій українській налаштованості захиститись ми обовʼязково зупинимо Росію та гарантуємо безпеку для нашої держави й людей. Відзначив...

The air attack was repulsed by aviation, anti-aircraft missile forces, electronic warfare units and...

The air attack was repulsed by aviation, anti-aircraft missile forces, electronic warfare units and...
